name: flownt-bridge
description: Local bridge connecting 3D printers to Flownt

scripts.package: npm run build && pkg dist/bundle.cjs --targets node18-macos-arm64,node18-macos-x64,node18-win-x64,node18-linux-arm64,node18-linux-x64 --output dist/flownt-bridge --compress GZip
scripts.package:mac: npm run build && pkg dist/bundle.cjs --targets node18-macos-arm64 --output dist/flownt-bridge-mac --compress GZip
